frozen_at: 2026-07-13 before any Jacobian score was computed
name: numeric-channel-jacobian-v1
question: At the recipient's exact update-0 LoRA tangent, does fitting the ds2 wolf-teacher rather than ds2 base-teacher number pool locally increase held-out wolf preference, and does this score predict the known and then prospectively measured update-512 transfer gap?

student_tangent.parameterization: PEFT LoRA at its exact historical update-0 initialization
student_tangent.historical_loss: Mean of the 1024 shuffled batch-8 CompletionDataset losses over the full 8192-row pool. The loss supervises every completion token, including commas.
student_tangent.shuffle: One exact historical DataLoader(shuffle=True) permutation per seed is frozen and shared by preference/control and by all receivers. Building the permutation consumes DataLoader's base-worker seed before RandomSampler, exactly as train.py does.

trait_readout.prompts: The fixed PREFERENCE_EVAL_PROMPTS in repository order

primary_score.interpretation: Positive S is the first-order wolf-margin change under an infinitesimal SGD move that preferentially fits wolf-teacher rather than control numbers.
primary_score.no_selection: No layer, prompt, metric, seed, or dataset subset is selected after observing results. Raw S on all 60 prompts is primary; cosine and decompositions are diagnostics.

pass_if: ds2 all-60 raw S is positive in both seeds
ds2 raw S exceeds ds1 raw S separately in both seeds
the same ds2 > ds1 ordering holds for prompts 1-30 and prompts 31-60 separately in both seeds
retrospective_gate.pool_half_scores: Diagnostic only. The first/second 4096 examples in the frozen shuffled order are not extra gates.

prospective_stage.prediction_lock: After scores are computed, write their sign and rank to prediction.json before training any fresh prospective student.
prospective_stage.endpoint: Preference-minus-control held-out wolf margin at optimizer update 512
prospective_stage.scope_note: These are predictive cross-lineage comparisons, not pure initialization interventions. Standard is an external reference; ds2-to-weight-seed receivers also changes ancestral data order.

scope: This is hard-label, teacher-forced sequence-loss alignment for the actual 19 supervised completion tokens (10 numbers and 9 commas), not the explicit sender probability-fingerprint assay. Because preference/control later-token histories differ, g_delta is J_pref^T r_pref - J_control^T r_control, not one shared J_number^T residual. Raw-S ranking of clipped-AdamW endpoints is a calibrated extrapolation; the exact first-AdamW-update score is secondary.
specificity_control: Compute the same all-60 tangent score for each of the ten candidate animals and report wolf rank and wolf-minus-mean-nonwolf. This is diagnostic, not part of the frozen retrospective gate.
failure_scope: Failure rejects only this update-0, historical-LoRA-local score. LoRA A gradients are zero at initialization and become active after B moves; failure would not refute a later nonlinear or full-weight credit-assignment path.
